reach.note: dump list after F8; selection fields (S_DATUM-LOW/HIGH + S_UNAME-LOW on newer RSSHOWRABAX; RST22_SUBMIT-* on older) and the ALV grid (cntlRSSHOWRABAX_ALV_100/shellcont/shell) are release-variant candidate scans, resolved live

dump detail after double-click on a list row (DEEP mode); body scraped from GuiTextedit controls anywhere in wnd[0]. On newer S/4HANA (RSSHOWRABAX screen 120, 'Runtime Error Long Text') the body is a GuiTree navigator with no scriptable section content -> detail_status=partial (exception/program still captured from the list level). required_ids [wnd[0]] is an intentional screen-exists floor: the detail body has no single release-stable control to assert, so drift surfaces at runtime as detail_status=partial, not via this baseline
